name: cronos-ai-agent-dev
documentation:
# Cronos AI Agent Dev version

This project is a cryptocurrency trading assistant designed to interact with users via a Telegram bot. It leverages various APIs and tools to provide insights and perform actions related to cryptocurrency trading.

## Installation

```shell
pip install cronos-ai-agent-dev
```

methods.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.remote.base_server.BaseServer.run
documentation: Run the FastAPI server using Uvicorn.

methods.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.remote.remote_processor.RemoteProcessor.__init__
documentation:
Initialize with multiple servers
servers: List of ServerInfo objects containing url and capabilities

methods.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.remote.remote_processor.RemoteProcessor._fetch_server_capabilities
documentation: Fetch tools and prompts from all servers

documentation: Create OpenAI assistant with given specs and prompts

methods.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.remote.remote_processor.RemoteProcessor._create_run
documentation: Create and manage OpenAI run using combined capabilities

methods.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.remote.remote_processor.RemoteProcessor._execute_function_calls
documentation: Execute function calls on a specific server

methods.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.remote.remote_processor.RemoteProcessor._map_functions_to_servers
documentation: Map function calls to appropriate servers

methods.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.remote.remote_processor.RemoteProcessor.process_run_result
documentation: Process OpenAI run result and execute necessary function calls

methods.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.remote.remote_processor.RemoteProcessor.process_message

methods.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.tools.Tools.execute_function
documentation:
Execute a registered function
Response format is {"success": True, "response": "response_text"} in text format

methods.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.tools.Tools.tools
documentation: Return list of all registered function specifications

methods.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.tools.Tools.active_tools
documentation: Return list of all registered function names

methods.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.functions.base_function.BaseFunction.execute
documentation: This specifies an exponential backoff strategy for waiting between retries.
The wait time will start at 4 seconds and can grow up to 10 seconds.

methods.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.functions.erc20_balance_function.ERC20BalanceFunction._validate_and_checksum_address
documentation:
Validate and convert address to checksum format.

Args:
    address (str): Ethereum address to validate
    address_type (str): Type of address for error messages ("wallet" or "token")

Returns:
    str: Checksum address

Raises:
    ValueError: If address is invalid

functions.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.functions.transaction_parser_function.is_chain_id_supported
documentation: Function to check if a chain ID is supported

functions.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.functions.transaction_parser_function.calculate_native_transfer
documentation: Function to calculate native token transfer

functions.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.functions.transaction_parser_function.parse_smart_contract_wallet_tx
documentation: Function to parse smart contract wallet transactions

methods.name: cronos_ai_agent_dev.error_handler.ErrorHandler.handle_function_error
documentation:
Handle errors during function execution and return a standardized error response.

Args:
    e (Exception): The exception that was raised.
    context (str): A string describing the context in which the error occurred.

Returns:
    Dict[str, Any]: A dictionary containing the success status and error message.
